js_057: The cosmos’s vanguard — your body moves the instant you think. Starting energy is your gift; just keep a friend nearby who’s good at finishing.
js_060: Center stage suits you. Your confidence warms everyone around you. Learn to shine even without applause and you’re unstoppable.
js_063: An explorer firing arrows toward a wider world. Optimism and motion are your oxygen. Being tied down is your only natural enemy.
js_066: A climber who won’t stop until the flag is on the summit. Quiet diligence is your strongest weapon — just rest at base camp now and then.
js_069: You’ve got an eye for what’s good and the grit to hold on to it. You never rush, but you always arrive. Change, too, can be a gift sometimes.
js_072: An eye for the 1% nobody else notices. You fix the world a little better, bit by bit. Just don’t aim that microscope too hard at yourself.
js_075: The cosmic mediator who can’t walk past anything tilted. You have a rare gift for connecting people. Take your own side once in a while, too.
js_078: A future-dweller who can’t settle for the same answer as everyone else. Not eccentric — just ahead of your time. Even when misunderstood, your convictions are usually right.
js_081: Max-level curiosity — even two interests aren’t enough. Words and ideas sparkle around you. Wide-but-shallow isn’t a flaw; it’s a talent for connecting things.
js_084: A guardian with the softest heart inside the hardest shell. For ‘your people’ you’ll bare your claws without hesitation. Turn that care on yourself, too.
js_087: A depth-seeker with no interest in shallow ties. Once you give your heart, you go all the way. That intensity is a gift not everyone has.
js_090: An empathic dreamer who reads others’ feelings like subtitles. Art and comfort are your native language. Just drop an anchor into reality now and then.
